endpoints.description: Show the hub with 4 evolution options (weekly, monthly, deep dive, history).
Run a knowledge base scan with 4-dimension quality scoring and diversity selection.

range_type.description: Time range: week, month, custom. Default: week.

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD, used when range_type=custom.

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD, used when range_type=custom.

save.description: Whether to save the report as a note: true or false. Default: true.

endpoints.description: 3-layer connection discovery: TF-IDF cosine filter → LLM relation classification → cross-domain bridging.

report_id.description: Optional scan report note id. If empty, uses the latest scan from local state.

endpoints.description: Generate a 3-7 item action list with 3 action types (supplement/create/connect).

report_id.description: Optional scan report note id. If empty, uses the latest from local state.

endpoints.description: Execute an action: show execution form (execute=true) or create note (execute=true + confirm=true). Never modifies original notes, always creates new + references.

execute.description: If 'true', shows execution form for the action at action_index.

confirm.description: If 'true', confirms execution and creates the note.

action_index.description: 0-based index of the action to execute.

endpoints.description: Show the deep dive input form (topic + time range). Submits to POST /deep_dive_ui.
Run a deep dive on the given topic. With empty topic, returns the form. With a topic, searches the knowledge base and uses LLM to write a structured report.

topic.description: Topic keyword(s) to deep dive. Required when running the dive.

input.description: Topic from shortcut <<evo <text>. Treated as topic when topic is empty.

time_range.description: Time range: week, month, all. Default: all.

save.description: Whether to save the report: true or false. Default: true.

endpoints.description: List historical evolution reports from the knowledge-evolution collection, filtered by type.

type.description: Filter by type: all, weekly, monthly, deep_dive. Default: all.

limit.description: Max number of reports to list. Default: 20.
